codeReview.summary: The commit cleanly adds the Create flow generation progress route/screen, inline Create form validation error states, and guard redirect behavior for /create/progress. The implementation aligns with expected behavior, and guarded Import/Onboard routes are already using <Navigate> so no guard-regression was introduced.

issues.description: Phase completion icon is implemented as inline SVG, which is inconsistent with the documented architecture convention to source icons from lucide-react.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md does not mention the architecture-level icon convention (use lucide-react instead of inline SVG), which makes style drift likely in new screens.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md states 'Icons — sourced from lucide-react, not inline SVGs or emoji'; this feature adds inline SVG at src/screens/GenerationProgressScreen.tsx:111

sharedStateObservations.observation: ui-builder SKILL.md prescribes test-first (TDD), but this worker implemented screen code before creating tests while still marking followedProcedure=true; the skill procedure appears stricter than actual execution norms.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton shows 'Create GenerationProgressScreen.tsx' before 'Create src/screens/__tests__/CreateFlow.test.tsx'; handoff skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true

summary: Reviewed transcript skeleton, handoff, skill file, and commit diff for create-generation-progress. Feature behavior is implemented and consistent with mission scope; no blocking correctness issues found. One non-blocking convention inconsistency (inline SVG icon) was noted along with shared-state documentation/skill-procedure observations.
